nasb.text: But he shall acknowledge the firstborn, the son of the unloved, by giving him a double portion of all that he has, for he is the beginning of his strength; to him belongs the right of the firstborn.

esv.text: but he shall acknowledge the firstborn, the son of the unloved, by giving him a double portion of all that he has, for he is the firstfruits of his strength. The right of the firstborn is his.

cnv.text: 卻要承認他不喜愛的妻子的兒子為長子，把所有的產業分兩分給他，因為這兒子是他強壯有力的時候所生的頭生子，長子的權利本是屬於他的。

ccb.text: 他必须承认他不爱之妻所生的长子的名分，分给他双份产业，因为长子是他壮年时所生的儿子，应享有长子的权利。
